title: Xeriscape Aerated Spanish Chilli Wrap
description: A romantic Spanish dish featuring hot chilli powder, perfect for a warm evening. The fluffy aerated chilli filling is a perfect match for the tender lotus-leaf wrap.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 180°C for 5 minutes before baking.
Place the lotus-leaf wraps on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 5 minutes, or until lightly browned and pliable.
In a large bowl, combine the chilli powder, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the diced chicken and mix well to coat with the spice blend.
